series_metadata.series_description: Records include As-Built drawings, construction documentation, reports, construction certifications, and Ground Water Monitoring Reports associated with Final Permits to Install

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep related facility is closed, records are superceded, or records are no longer of vaue Division as technical reference verify construction requirements were met and additional design criteria were properly installed. Review/update annually ; Electronic: Keep related facility is closed, records are superceded, or records are no longer of vaue Division as technical reference verify construction requirements were met and additional design criteria were properly installed. Review/update annually
